# comfyui_create_hook_lora_model_only (Resource)

(EXPERIMENTAL) ComfyUI CreateHookLoraModelOnly node — Create Hook LoRA (MO) [advanced/hooks/create]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
